organization.name: Meridian Calibration Labs
organization.description: Independent metrology and instrumentation calibration laboratory serving industrial process customers.

teams.name: Instrumentation & Controls
teams.description: Owns field sensors, transmitters, and process instrumentation.

teams.name: Metrology Lab
teams.description: Reference standards, primary calibration lab, and traceability chain.

teams.name: Process Engineering
teams.description: Process design support and instrumentation specification.

teams.name: Reliability & Maintenance
teams.description: Preventive maintenance and asset reliability programs.

teams.name: Quality Assurance
teams.description: ISO/IEC 17025 quality system, audits, and document control.

procedures.name: Pressure transmitter — 5-point linearity
procedures.description: Five-point ascending and descending calibration of a pressure transmitter against a dead-weight tester or reference gauge.
procedures.author: Priya Natarajan
safety_notes: Maximum system pressure must not exceed rated range of the DUT.
Depressurize system fully before disconnecting fittings.

steps.title: Connect DUT
steps.description: Flush lines. Secure all fittings. Verify no leaks.

steps.title: Zero check
steps.description: Vent to atmosphere. Record zero output. Adjust if outside ±0.03% FS.

steps.title: Ascending points 25-100% span
steps.description: Apply 25%, 50%, 75%, and 100% span. Allow 2 min per point.

steps.title: Descending points 75-0% span
steps.description: Step down through 75%, 50%, 25%, 0%. Record output.

steps.title: Compute & sign
steps.description: Calculate linearity and hysteresis errors. Sign calibration report.

procedures.name: RTD PT100 — ice point + dry-block
procedures.description: Three-point temperature calibration: 0 °C ice bath plus two dry-block points. Validates PT100 conformance to class A.
procedures.author: Tomasz Riedel
safety_notes: Dry-block surfaces exceed 200 °C — use insulated handling tools.
Allow 20 min cool-down before removing probes.

steps.title: Build the ice point
steps.description: Pack crushed ice in a Dewar, add distilled water until slushy.

steps.title: Insert reference & DUT
steps.description: Submerge both probes to 150 mm depth, separated by 20 mm.

steps.title: Record 0 °C
steps.description: Capture 5 readings at 10 s intervals.

steps.title: Dry-block points
steps.description: Ramp through 100 °C and 200 °C. Stabilize, then record.

steps.title: Compute & sign
steps.description: Compute residuals. Upload certificate.

procedures.name: Humidity sensor — saturated salt solution
procedures.description: Multi-point calibration of capacitive humidity sensors using saturated salt solutions to generate reference RH conditions.
procedures.author: Marcus Webb
safety_notes: LiCl is hygroscopic and irritating — wear gloves and lab coat.

steps.title: Prepare salt solutions
steps.description: Prepare saturated solutions of LiCl, NaCl, and KCl.

steps.title: Seal DUT in chambers
steps.description: Place DUT and reference probe in the first chamber.

steps.title: Equilibrate & record
steps.description: Allow 6-12 h equilibration per chamber. Record readings.

steps.title: Compute & sign
steps.description: Calculate offset and gain errors.

procedures.name: Flow meter — zero and span verification
procedures.description: Zero-flow and full-span verification for electromagnetic and vortex flow meters installed in closed-loop pipelines.
procedures.author: Elena Kowalski
safety_notes: Ensure isolation valves are locked out per site LOTO procedure before entering flow path.
Pressurized pipes — never break connections without full depressurization.

steps.title: Isolate flow path
steps.description: Close isolation valves. Apply LOTO.

steps.title: Record zero output
steps.description: Monitor flow transmitter output for 5 min.

steps.title: Evaluate zero offset
steps.description: Adjust zero trim if drift > 0.5% FS.

steps.title: Restore flow
steps.description: Remove LOTO. Confirm return to normal flow reading.

steps.title: Document & sign
steps.description: Record zero offset and sign the verification record.

procedures.name: Level transmitter — hydrostatic head verification
procedures.description: Multi-point level calibration using a graduated head-height rig to verify radar, ultrasonic, and hydrostatic level transmitters.
procedures.author: Priya Natarajan
safety_notes: Confirm tank/vessel is depressurized and isolated before entry.

steps.title: Set zero level
steps.description: Drain to empty. Record zero output.

steps.title: Ascending head points
steps.description: Fill to 25%, 50%, 75%, 100% of span. Record output at each.

steps.title: Compute & sign
steps.description: Calculate linearity error. Sign calibration report.

procedures.name: Load cell — deadweight force calibration
procedures.description: Deadweight-based force calibration of strain-gauge and piezoelectric load cells across their rated range.
procedures.author: Sarah Lindqvist
safety_notes: Deadweight stacks are heavy — use mechanical hoist for masses above 25 kg.

steps.title: Mounting & zero
steps.description: Mount load cell per manufacturer spec. Record zero.

steps.title: Ascending points
steps.description: Apply 20%, 40%, 60%, 80%, 100% of rated capacity.

steps.title: Descending points
steps.description: Remove weights in reverse order. Record output.

steps.title: Compute & sign
steps.description: Calculate linearity, hysteresis, and repeatability.

procedures.name: Torque transducer — reference torque calibration
procedures.description: Static torque calibration using a reference torque wrench/transducer and calibrated lever-arm weights.
procedures.author: Marcus Webb
safety_notes: Secure the lever arm before releasing counterweights.

steps.title: Zero check
steps.description: Record zero-torque output.

steps.title: Ascending points
steps.description: Apply 25%, 50%, 75%, 100% of rated torque, both directions.

steps.title: Compute & sign
steps.description: Calculate linearity and reversal error.

procedures.name: Precision balance — OIML weight set calibration
procedures.description: Calibration of precision balances and platform scales against a traceable OIML Class E2/F1 weight set.
procedures.author: Tomasz Riedel
safety_notes: Handle weights with gloves/forceps only — skin oils affect mass over time.

steps.title: Zero / tare
steps.description: Record zero reading with empty pan.

steps.title: Ascending points
steps.description: Apply weights at 20%, 40%, 60%, 80%, 100% of capacity.

steps.title: Compute & sign
steps.description: Calculate linearity and eccentricity error.

procedures.name: Multifunction calibrator — DC voltage/current/resistance verification
procedures.description: Verification of DC voltage, current, and resistance measurement channels against a traceable multifunction calibrator.
procedures.author: Sarah Lindqvist
safety_notes: De-energize circuits before connecting/disconnecting test leads.

steps.title: Zero check
steps.description: Verify zero reading with inputs shorted/open as applicable.

steps.title: Ascending points
steps.description: Source 25%, 50%, 75%, 100% of range. Record indicated value.

steps.title: Compute & sign
steps.description: Calculate error at each point against tolerance.

procedures.name: Displacement & angle sensor — laser interferometer verification
procedures.description: High-accuracy linear displacement and angular position verification using a laser interferometer reference.
procedures.author: Priya Natarajan
safety_notes: Laser class 2 — avoid direct beam viewing.

steps.title: Align reference
steps.description: Align interferometer optics to the travel/rotation axis.

steps.title: Ascending points
steps.description: Step through 20%, 40%, 60%, 80%, 100% of travel/range.

steps.title: Compute & sign
steps.description: Calculate linearity error against travel/rotation.

procedures.name: Accelerometer — back-to-back comparison calibration
procedures.description: Back-to-back comparison calibration of piezoelectric/MEMS accelerometers against a reference accelerometer on a shaker table.
procedures.author: Elena Kowalski
safety_notes: Secure test fixture before energizing the shaker table.

steps.title: Mount DUT & reference
steps.description: Mount both accelerometers back-to-back on the shaker table.

steps.title: Sweep points
steps.description: Apply reference acceleration at 20%, 40%, 60%, 80%, 100% of range.

steps.title: Compute & sign
steps.description: Calculate sensitivity deviation against reference.

drift_group.label: Maximum Drift
drift_group.tooltip: Largest absolute deviation observed between any calibration and the baseline (first) calibration, evaluated across the shared operating range.

drift_group.label: RMS Drift
drift_group.tooltip: Root-mean-square of the per-calibration maximum drift values — a measure of overall drift dispersion, less sensitive to a single outlier than Maximum Drift.

drift_group.label: Drift Rate
drift_group.tooltip: Long-term rate of change of drift over the full calibration history, from a linear regression.

drift_group.label: Regression Slope
drift_group.tooltip: Slope of the drift-evolution trend line — identical to Drift Rate, shown here for traceability with the chart.

drift_group.label: Regression R²
drift_group.tooltip: Goodness of fit (0-1) of the drift trend line. Values near 1 indicate a consistent, predictable drift pattern.

statistics_group.label: Expanded Uncertainty
statistics_group.tooltip: Combined measurement uncertainty of the most recent calibration, expanded by its coverage factor (typically k=2, ~95% confidence).

statistics_group.label: Hysteresis
statistics_group.tooltip: Maximum difference between measured values at the same reference point approached from opposite directions (ascending vs. descending).

statistics_group.label: Non-linearity
statistics_group.tooltip: Deviation of the calibration curve from a straight line, as a percentage of full-scale span.

trends_group.label: Δ RMSE
trends_group.tooltip: Change in RMSE between the two most recent calibrations. Positive means RMSE increased (degrading).

trends_group.label: Δ Uncertainty
trends_group.tooltip: Change in expanded uncertainty between the two most recent calibrations.

trends_group.label: Δ Maximum Error
trends_group.tooltip: Change in maximum error between the two most recent calibrations.

trends_group.label: Δ Hysteresis
trends_group.tooltip: Change in hysteresis between the two most recent calibrations.

trends_group.label: Trend Classification
trends_group.tooltip: Overall direction of the instrument's calibration statistics: improving, stable, or degrading.
